digest.greeting: Jean, Monday closed with the July 1 follow-up scheduling moved forward and a few late-day items now ready for tomorrow. The biggest carry-forward threads are still the KPI SMART goals, the LeadUp 2A closeout, and making the transition and portfolio follow-ups crisp for Tuesday.

items.label: Scheduled the Nicolas, Thiago, and Laura 1:1s
items.detail: The structure-change follow-up meetings moved forward today, and Outlook shows acceptance responses from Thiago and Laura.

items.label: Turn the KPI set into SMART goals
items.detail: Keep this first for Tuesday. The midyear and goals path still needs the KPI set shaped into concrete SMART goals and ready for Sara follow-up.

items.label: Complete the LeadUp Module 2A knowledge check
items.detail: The training closeout remains open behind the KPI, transition, and portfolio work.

items.label: Close the structure-change and MHE RFE support loop with Camilo
items.detail: This reminder was due today. Carry forward any remaining support or ownership decisions needed to make the July 1 structure change practical.

items.label: Review the LLF_CIO_Transition workbook signal
items.detail: Nadia shared the workbook this morning with Jean, Javier, Jorge, and Thiago for awareness. Keep the transition implications connected to the Amazon Connect/Agentforce Voice and structure-change conversations.

items.label: Prepare the EPMO Portfolio Review decision points
items.detail: Keep the open request decisions clear: intake ownership, PM or PE assignment, rejection communication, and cross-org impact review.

items.label: Capture PM Feedback next steps cleanly
items.detail: The PM Feedback block was short and included Sara, Eugenia, Stephanie Baily, and Jean. Make sure the takeaway is tied to a clear owner and follow-up time.

items.label: Think through the goals for Sara
items.detail: A new afternoon reminder says, 'Think goals for me - Sara.' Keep this connected to the SMART KPI work so the goals discussion does not split into a separate thread.

items.label: Review the IT spreadsheets with Mar on Tuesday
items.detail: Jessica sent IT spreadsheets for Post-submission Case Change and Missing EAD tasksets. Jean forwarded the thread to Mar and noted that they would review it Tuesday.

items.label: Triage the new Phase 1 intake alert
items.detail: Janet sent a late-day Asana intake alert from Danny Miller for Phase 1. Review the intake link and decide the next routing step.

items.label: 1:1 Jhara & Jean
items.detail: Agenda is portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps. Good place to keep Send Letters Queue and other active project blockers crisp.

items.label: Portfolio Review
items.detail: Jorge's broader portfolio review is set up to review Phase I, Phase II, and Court projects, watch items, owners, and follow-ups.

items.label: EPMO TL Weekly Catch Up
items.detail: Weekly touchpoint with Janet, Eugenia, Jorge, and Jean.

items.label: 1:1 Yuri & Jean
items.detail: Useful slot for IT-adjacent project follow-ups after the portfolio conversations.

items.label: CoE: Touchpoint
items.detail: Mar and Jean are on the calendar. Keep today's CIO transition and CoE dependency signals handy.

items.label: Review the IT spreadsheets with Mar
items.detail: Jean's email said the Post-submission Case Change and Missing EAD taskset spreadsheets would be reviewed Tuesday.
